assessment.note: She names a clear clarity problem: delayed sharing creates stakeholder surprise and erodes trust; no direct wellbeing signal.

new_queue.label: Surprised late
new_queue.name: Stakeholders feeling surprised late — where does that pattern show up most?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific pattern she named so the gap is anchored in concrete situations.

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?
new_queue.description: Tests whether they can name their own gaps before the manager does.

new_queue.label: Leverage choices
new_queue.name: Where do you choose to go deep instead of pulling others in earlier?
new_queue.description: Probes the judgment call between execution depth and earlier alignment.

new_queue.label: Next-step commitment
new_queue.name: What would raising your visibility look like in the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete behavioural commitment with a near-term date.
